hero.text: We're Team Human, a community of builders who believe the best tech starts with empathy, creativity, and real human connection.
beliefs.title: What we believe
beliefs.empathy.title: Empathy First
beliefs.empathy.desc: Great products start with understanding people — not just users, but humans with real needs and emotions.
beliefs.courage.title: Creative Courage
beliefs.courage.desc: AI can optimize, but only humans can imagine what doesn't exist yet. We celebrate the weird, bold ideas.
beliefs.community.title: Community Over Competition
beliefs.community.desc: We grow faster together. Our meetups are spaces where makers share honestly — wins, failures, and everything between.
beliefs.craft.title: Craft Matters
beliefs.craft.desc: In a world of AI-generated everything, the human touch is a superpower. We value intentional, thoughtful work.
team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Real events, real people, real conversations.
